name: Theme International Holdings Limited
summary: Theme International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the distribution and trading of bulk commodities and related products in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and Singapore. It provides personal loan, mortgage, installment credit, market making, margin financing, structured trade, and other credit granting services; and securities and commodity contracts dealing, securities brokerage, commodity futures and gold bullion broking and dealing, and fund management services, as well as trades in metals and metal ores. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
